name_cn:
🌟New Cleo Crossbody Bag
This new vintage-style crossbody bag is made with imported water-wave calf leather and lined with imported sheepskin. Features an adjustable shoulder strap for a single shoulder carry. The look is stunning! Large capacity and highly practical, soft touch, and full of a premium feel.
Dimensions: 27x20x7cm
Model: 1BC179
